mapper.select: SELECT price_id , stock_cd , price_dt , open_price , high_price , low_price , close_price , volume , reg_dt FROM tbl_stock_price_history WHERE stock_cd = #{stockCd} ORDER BY price_dt DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.ticker AS stockCd , c.company_name AS stockNm , c.company_name_ko AS stockNmKo , c.sector AS sector , c.sector_ko AS sectorKo , h.price_dt AS priceDt , h.open_price AS openPrice , h.high_price AS highPrice , h.low_price AS lowPrice , h.close_price AS closePrice , h.volume FROM tbl_companies c LEFT JOIN tbl_stock_price_history h ON c.ticker = h.stock_cd AND h.price_dt = ( SELECT MAX(price_dt) FROM tbl_stock_price_history WHERE stock_cd = c.ticker ) ORDER BY c.ticker

SELECT c.ticker AS stockCd , c.company_name AS companyName , c.sector AS sector , lp.open_price AS openPrice , lp.close_price AS closePrice , agg.week52_high AS week52High , agg.week52_low AS week52Low FROM tbl_companies c LEFT JOIN tbl_stock_price_history lp ON lp.stock_cd = c.ticker AND lp.price_dt = ( SELECT MAX(price_dt) FROM tbl_stock_price_history WHERE stock_cd = c.ticker ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_cd , MAX(high_price) AS week52_high , MIN(low_price) AS week52_low FROM tbl_stock_price_history WHERE price_dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY stock_cd ) agg ON agg.stock_cd = c.ticker WHERE c.ticker IN
#{stockCd}
